```typescript
declare function watchFolder(path: string): AsyncIterable<string>;
declare function resizeImage(buffer: Buffer, width: number, height: number): Promise<Buffer>;
declare function uploadToS3(bucket: string, key: string, data: Buffer): Promise<void>;

async function main() {
  const folderPath = './uploads';
  const bucketName = 'my-thumbnail-bucket';

  for await (const filePath of watchFolder(folderPath)) {
    if (!filePath.endsWith('.png') && !filePath.endsWith('.jpg') && !filePath.endsWith('.jpeg')) {
      continue;
    }

    const buffer = await readFile(filePath);
    const thumbnail = await resizeImage(buffer, 256, 256);
    const key = `thumbnails/${filePath.split('/').pop()}`;

    await uploadToS3(bucketName, key, thumbnail);
  }
}
```

```typescript
async function resolveDomain(domain: string): Promise<string> {
  const now = Date.now();
  const cacheKey = domain;
  const ttlMs = 300000; // 5 minutes

  // 1. Check Cache
  const cacheQuery = `SELECT ip, expires_at FROM dns_cache WHERE domain = '${cacheKey}' AND expires_at > ${now}`;
  const cacheResults = await queryDatabase(cacheQuery);
  
  const validEntry = filterBy(cacheResults, (row) => row.expires_at > now)[0];

  if (validEntry) {
    await logToAudit({ action: 'dns_cache_hit', domain: cacheKey });
    return validEntry.ip;
  }

  // 2. Look up in Authoritative Nameserver (via DoH)
  const upstreamUrl = `https://dns.google/resolve?name=${encodeURIComponent(cacheKey)}&type=A`;
  const upstreamResponse = await fetchFromApi(upstreamUrl, { method: 'GET' });
  
  if (!upstreamResponse.Answer || upstreamResponse.Answer.length === 0) {
    throw new Error(`No IP found for domain: ${cacheKey}`);
  }

  const ip = mapItems(upstreamResponse.Answer, (record) => record.data)[0];
  const expiresAt = now + ttlMs;

  // 3. Cache the result with TTL
  await writeToDatabase('dns_cache', {
    domain: cacheKey,
    ip: ip,
    expires_at: expiresAt
  });

  await logToAudit({ action: 'dns_cache_miss', domain: cacheKey, ip: ip });

  // 4. Return resolved IP
  return ip;
}
```

```typescript
async function main() {
  const categories = ['urgent', 'newsletter', 'other'];
  const otherBuffer: any[] = [];
  const BUFFER_SIZE = 50;

  for await (const email of watchEmail({ filter: 'inbox' })) {
    const text = `${email.subject} ${email.body}`;
    const classification = await llmClassify(text, categories);

    await logToAudit({ emailId: email.id, classification });

    if (classification === 'urgent') {
      await writeToDatabase('priority_list', email);
    } else if (classification === 'newsletter') {
      await writeToDatabase('newsletter_digest', email);
    } else {
      otherBuffer.push(email);
    }

    if (otherBuffer.length >= BUFFER_SIZE) {
      await flushOtherCounts(otherBuffer);
      otherBuffer.length = 0;
    }
  }

  if (otherBuffer.length > 0) {
    await flushOtherCounts(otherBuffer);
  }
}

async function flushOtherCounts(emails: any[]) {
  const grouped = groupBy(emails, 'sender');
  const counts = mapItems(Object.entries(grouped), ([sender, items]) => ({
    sender,
    count: items.length
  }));
  await writeToDatabase('sender_counts', counts);
}
```

interface BuildContext {
  image: string;
  version: string;
  repo: string;
  slackChannel: string;
}

async function main(context: BuildContext): Promise<void> {
  const { image, version, repo, slackChannel } = context;
  const baseUrl = 'https://ci.internal.api';

  try {
    await Promise.all([
      // Push Docker image to registry
      fetchFromApi(`${baseUrl}/registry/push`, {
        method: 'POST',
        body: JSON.stringify({ image, version }),
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      }),
      // Update deployment manifest in GitOps repo
      fetchFromApi(`${baseUrl}/gitops/manifest`, {
        method: 'PUT',
        body: JSON.stringify({ repo, version }),
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      }),
      // Tag the Git commit with release version
      fetchFromApi(`${baseUrl}/git/tag`, {
        method: 'POST',
        body: JSON.stringify({ repo, version }),
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      }),
      // Send Slack notification
      sendSlackMessage(slackChannel, `✅ Build ${version} completed for ${image}`),
    ]);

    await logToAudit({
      event: 'pipeline_complete',
      image,
      version,
      status: 'success',
    });
  } catch (error) {
    await sendSlackMessage(slackChannel, `❌ Pipeline failed for ${image}: ${error}`);
    await logToAudit({
      event: 'pipeline_complete',
      image,
      version,
      status: 'failed',
      error: String(error),
    });
    throw error;
  }
}

```typescript
async function checkRateLimit(ip: string): Promise<boolean> {
  const sixtySecondsAgo = Date.now() - 60000;
  const sql = `SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM request_logs WHERE client_ip = '${ip}' AND timestamp > ${sixtySecondsAgo}`;
  const results = await queryDatabase(sql);
  const count = results[0]?.count || 0;
  return count >= 100;
}

async function recordRequest(ip: string): Promise<void> {
  await writeToDatabase('request_logs', {
    client_ip: ip,
    timestamp: Date.now(),
  });
}

async function handleRequest(ip: string): Promise<{ status: number; message?: string }> {
  const isLimited = await checkRateLimit(ip);
  if (isLimited) {
    return { status: 429, message: 'Too Many Requests' };
  }
  await recordRequest(ip);
  return { status: 200 };
}
```

```typescript
interface ScoreEvent {
  playerId: string;
  score: number;
}

interface LeaderboardEntry {
  playerId: string;
  score: number;
  rank: number;
}

async function updateLeaderboard(current: LeaderboardEntry[], event: ScoreEvent): Promise<LeaderboardEntry[]> {
  const existingIndex = current.findIndex(e => e.playerId === event.playerId);
  if (existingIndex >= 0) {
    current[existingIndex].score = event.score;
  } else {
    current.push({ playerId: event.playerId, score: event.score, rank: 0 });
  }

  const sorted = [...current].sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score);
  const top10 = sorted.slice(0, 10);
  
  return top10.map((entry, index) => ({ ...entry, rank: index + 1 }));
}

function leaderboardChanged(old: LeaderboardEntry[], new: LeaderboardEntry[]): boolean {
  if (old.length !== new.length) return true;
  return old.some((entry, i) => entry.playerId !== new[i].playerId || entry.score !== new[i].score);
}

async function broadcastToClients(clients: Map<string, any>, entries: LeaderboardEntry[]): Promise<void> {
  const message = JSON.stringify(entries);
  for (const [clientId, socket] of clients) {
    socket.send(message);
  }
}

async function main() {
  const leaderboard: LeaderboardEntry[] = [];
  const clients = new Map<string, any>(); // Mock connected clients
  const eventStream = connectWebSocket('wss://game-server.com/scores');

  for await (const event of eventStream) {
    const newLeaderboard = await updateLeaderboard(leaderboard, event);
    
    if (leaderboardChanged(leaderboard, newLeaderboard)) {
      leaderboard.length = 0;
      leaderboard.push(...newLeaderboard);
      
      await broadcastToClients(clients, leaderboard);
      await writeToDatabase('leaderboard', leaderboard);
      await logToAudit({ action: 'leaderboard_update', count: leaderboard.length });
    }
  }
}
```

```typescript
type CircuitState = 'CLOSED' | 'OPEN' | 'HALF_OPEN';

interface LogEntry {
  timestamp: number;
  success: boolean;
}

interface CircuitBreakerState {
  state: CircuitState;
  lastFailureTime: number;
  log: LogEntry[];
  probePending: boolean;
}

const DEGRADED_RESPONSE = {
  status: 'degraded',
  message: 'Payment gateway unavailable',
  fallback: true,
};

const WINDOW_MS = 30000;
const RESET_TIMEOUT_MS = 10000;
const FAILURE_THRESHOLD = 0.5;

function createCircuitBreaker(): CircuitBreakerState {
  return {
    state: 'CLOSED',
    lastFailureTime: 0,
    log: [],
    probePending: false,
  };
}

function updateState(
  state: CircuitBreakerState,
  newState: CircuitState,
  timestamp: number
): void {
  state.state = newState;
  if (newState === 'OPEN') {
    state.lastFailureTime = timestamp;
  }
  if (newState === 'CLOSED') {
    state.log = [];
  }
  if (newState === 'HALF_OPEN') {
    state.probePending = false;
  }
}

async function executePaymentRequest(
  breaker: CircuitBreakerState,
  payload: any
): Promise<any> {
  const now = Date.now();

  // Check state transitions
  if (breaker.state === 'OPEN') {
    if (now - breaker.lastFailureTime > RESET_TIMEOUT_MS) {
      updateState(breaker, 'HALF_OPEN', now);
    } else {
      await logToAudit({
        type: 'CIRCUIT_OPEN',
        message: 'Circuit breaker is open, short-circuiting',
      });
      return DEGRADED_RESPONSE;
    }
  }

  // Handle HALF_OPEN (Probe)
  if (breaker.state === 'HALF_OPEN') {
    if (breaker.probePending) {
      await logToAudit({
        type: 'CIRCUIT_PROBE_WAIT',
        message: 'Probe request already in flight',
      });
      return DEGRADED_RESPONSE;
    }
    breaker.probePending = true;
  }

  try {
    const result = await fetchFromApi('https://api.payment-gateway.com/charge', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify(payload),
    });

    // Record success
    breaker.log.push({ timestamp: now, success: true });
    breaker.log = filterBy(breaker.log, (entry) => now - entry.timestamp < WINDOW_MS);

    if (breaker.state === 'HALF_OPEN') {
      updateState(breaker, 'CLOSED', now);
      await logToAudit({
        type: 'CIRCUIT_RECOVERED',
        message: 'Circuit breaker recovered after probe',
      });
    }

    return result;
  } catch (error) {
    // Record failure
    breaker.log.push({ timestamp: now, success: false });
    breaker.log = filterBy(breaker.log, (entry) => now - entry.timestamp < WINDOW_MS);

    if (breaker.state === 'HALF_OPEN') {
      updateState(breaker, 'OPEN', now);
      await logToAudit({
        type: 'CIRCUIT_OPEN',
        message: 'Probe failed, circuit opened',
      });
      return DEGRADED_RESPONSE;
    }

    // Check failure rate in CLOSED state
    const stats = aggregate(
      breaker.log,
      (acc, entry) => ({
        total: acc.total + 1,
        failures: entry.success ? acc.failures : acc.failures + 1,
      }),
      { total: 0, failures: 0 }
    );

    if (stats.total > 0 && stats.failures / stats.total > FAILURE_THRESHOLD) {
      updateState(breaker, 'OPEN', now);
      await logToAudit({
        type: 'CIRCUIT_OPEN',
        message: `Failure rate exceeded threshold: ${stats.failures}/${stats.total}`,
      });
      return DEGRADED_RESPONSE;
    }

    throw error;
  }
}

async function main() {
  const breaker = createCircuitBreaker();
  const payload = { amount: 100, currency: 'USD' };

  try {
    const result = await executePaymentRequest(breaker, payload);
    console.log('Payment result:', result);
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('Payment failed:', err);
  }
}
```
